basic_details.job_title: RIE Bhubaneswar Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 56 Posts
basic_details.post_name: PGT, TGT, PRT Lab Assistant and More
basic_details.short_information: Regional Institute of Education Bhubaneswar (RIE Bhubaneswar) Various Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 15 April 2024 on the official website. A total of 56 vacancies have been announced through the RIE Bhubaneswar Various Posts Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: As per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/PH categories
age_limit.details: All Posts: As per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/PH categories.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's/Bachelor's Degree with minimum 50% marks, B.Ed. or equivalent, CTET Paper I/II as applicable, Relevant experience desirable
qualification.details: P.G.T. (English): Master's Degree in English with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent + CTET. P.G.T. (Geography): Master's Degree in Geography with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent + CTET. P.G.T. (Sanskrit): Master's Degree in Sanskrit with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent + CTET. P.G.T. (Physics): Master's Degree in Physics with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent + CTET. P.G.T. (Guidance & Counselling): Master's Degree in Psychology with 50% marks + Diploma in Counselling. P.G.T. (Computer Science): B.E/B.Tech (Comp Sc/IT)/M.Sc (Comp Sc)/MCA/M.Tech with 50% marks + B.Ed. T.G.T. (English): Bachelor's Degree with 50% marks in English + B.Ed. + CTET (Upper Primary). T.G.T. (Biology): Bachelor's Degree with 50% marks in Biology + B.Ed. + CTET (Upper Primary). T.G.T. (Pol. Science): Bachelor's Degree with 50% marks in Pol. Science + B.Ed. + CTET (Upper Primary). T.G.T. (Geography): Bachelor's Degree with 50% marks in Geography + B.Ed. + CTET (Upper Primary). T.G.T. (History): Bachelor's Degree with 50% marks in History + B.Ed. + CTET (Upper Primary). T.G.T. (Physics): Bachelor's Degree with 50% marks in Physics + B.Ed. + CTET (Upper Primary). T.G.T. (Chemistry): Bachelor's Degree with 50% marks in Chemistry + B.Ed. + CTET (Upper Primary). T.G.T. (Hindi): Bachelor's Degree with 50% marks in Hindi + B.Ed. + CTET (Upper Primary). T.G.T. (Odia): Bachelor's Degree with 50% marks in Odia + B.Ed. + CTET (Upper Primary). T.G.T. (Health & Physical Education): Bachelor's Degree in Physical Education + B.P.Ed./M.P.Ed. + CTET. T.G.T. (Dance): Bachelor's Degree in Dance + B.Ed. + CTET. P.R.T.: Senior Secondary with 50% + 2 yr Diploma in Elementary Education + CTET (Primary). P.R.T. (Music): Senior Secondary + Bachelor in Music. Work Experience Teacher (W.E.T.) (Computer Science): Relevant qualification in Computer Science. Work Experience Teacher (W.E.T.) (Art & Craft): Relevant qualification in Art & Craft. Work Experience Teacher (W.E.T.) (System & Network Engineering): Relevant qualification in System & Network Engineering. Work Experience Teacher (W.E.T.) Animal Husbandry (Dairy Farming): Relevant qualification in Animal Husbandry/Dairy Farming. Work Experience Teacher (W.E.T.) (Agricultural Farming): Relevant qualification in Agricultural Farming. Professional Assistant: Master's Degree in Library Science or equivalent. Sr. Library Attendant: Graduate + Library qualification. Pre-Primary Teacher: Senior Secondary with 50% + Diploma in Pre-School Education. Lady Helper: Matriculation or equivalent. Vocational Education Teacher (IT - ITes): Relevant vocational qualification in IT-ITeS. Vocational Education Teacher (Beauty & Wellness): Relevant vocational qualification in Beauty & Wellness. Lab Assistant (Chemistry): B.Sc. in Chemistry + Lab experience. Lab Assistant (Botany): B.Sc. in Botany + Lab experience.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Work Experience Teacher (W.E.T.) Animal Husbandry (Dairy Farming)

selection_process: Walk-in-Interview Verification of original documents Panel preparation for future engagement

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by RIE Bhubaneswar?
faq.answer: RIE Bhubaneswar has announced a total of 56 vacancies for various teaching and non-teaching posts through a walk-in interview process.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with their documents.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary range for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the selected candidates will range from Rs. 15,000/- to Rs. 51,000/- per month, depending on the post and qualifications.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualifications vary by post, generally requiring a Master's or Bachelor's Degree with at least 50% marks, along with B.Ed. or equivalent and CTET where applicable.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for RIE Bhubaneswar recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be conducted from 13 May 2026 to 28 May 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the contract tenure for these positions?
faq.answer: The contract tenure for the selected candidates will be up to 30 April 2027.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the venue for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Regional Institute of Education Bhubaneswar, Odisha, 751022.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates, along with self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations available?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxations are available for SC/ST/OBC/PH categories as per the Government of India rules.
